query:
-- Check user creation patterns - are these real users or seed data?
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) AS created_date,
  COUNT(*) AS users_created,
  MIN(name) AS sample_name_min,
  MAX(name) AS sample_name_max
FROM users 
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY created_date DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:

  DATE(createdAt) AS created_date,
  COUNT(*) AS users_created,
  MIN(name) AS sample_name_min,
  MAX(name) AS sample_name_max
FROM users 
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY created_date DESC 
LIMIT 20;
